name: Kimberley Hefner's Chilled Tomato Salsa W/Ang
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped tomatoes, red and yellow peppers, onion, and garlic with basil and olive oil.
2. Season to taste with sea salt and white pepper.
3. Cook the pasta in boiling salted water until al dente. Drain well.
4. Place the pasta on a plate and top with the vegetable sauce.
5. Serve the crushed hot red pepper and grated Romano cheese on the side.
6. Makes 2 servings as an entree, or 4 as an appetizer.
